action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. Need a continual learning baseline on CIFAR-100 split into 10 tasks. Analysis: A solid approach is LwF (Learning without Forgetting) or simple replay with a ResNet18 backbone. Given time constraints, I'll start with experience replay using a small memory buffer + knowledge distillation. Decision: Build initial pipeline with ResNet18 (from torchvision pretrained, adapted for 32x32) + replay buffer + KD distillation. Train few epochs per task to validate, then submit eval to measure timing.
